summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ManoProtect SEO/SEM features and checkout with company info. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (landing, pricing, privacy policy, legal notice) load correctly with proper SEO meta tags and company info (STARTBOOKING SL, CIF B19427723). No ManoBank references found anywhere.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO/SEM features fully implemented. robots.txt and sitemap.xml accessible at /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml. Checkout endpoint POST /api/create-checkout-session returns company info (STARTBOOKING SL, CIF B19427723). All legal pages show correct company info. No ManoBank references in frontend or backend.

landing_page_seo.details: SEO meta tags present: title, description, keywords, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, Schema.org (3 scripts)

robots_txt.details: Accessible at /robots.txt with proper User-agent directives and Sitemap reference

sitemap_xml.details: Accessible at /sitemap.xml with all key pages (/, /verificar-estafa, /pricing, /login, /registro)

checkout_company_info.details: POST /api/create-checkout-session returns company: {name: 'STARTBOOKING SL', cif: 'B19427723', country: 'ES'}

pricing_page.details: Shows all plans correctly (individual, family, business) with prices in EUR

privacy_policy.details: Shows STARTBOOKING SL and CIF B19427723 correctly

legal_notice.details: Shows STARTBOOKING SL and CIF B19427723 correctly

no_manobank_references.details: No ManoBank references found in frontend pages or backend API responses
